UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2021, PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR PROVE UP HEARING IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGEMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT BRUCE PATRICK CANTANESE - GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND SUBMIT SAME TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LINDA FORSTER, CSR #13286. EMAIL: LFORSTER@SSFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE KENILWORTH APRATMENTS, LLC , A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATANESE, BRUCE PATRICK , AN INDIVIDUAL $12,553.33 PRINCIPAL, $1,140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,693.33, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2021 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion For Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Application For Default Judgement Against Defendant Bruce Patrick Cantanese
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Bruce Patrick Catanese, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286. Email: lforster@ssftc.org.

Marina Franco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Kenilworth Apartments LLC, a California limited liability company.
Robert Giannini, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Franco and Mr. Giannini appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Bruce Patrick Catanese, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on December 11, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying on defendant Bruce Patrick Catanese, an individual, occurred on January 11, 2021, and was effectuated on January 21, 2021.
Default as to defendant Bruce Patrick Catanese, an individual, was entered on February 22, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 21, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Kenilworth Apartments LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendants Bruce Patrick Catanese, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,553.33.
Costs - $1,140.00.

Total - $13,693.33.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
